**5. Key Numbers, Constants, Parameters:**

*   High speed video camera rate: 4500 pictures per second
*   Optical flame sensor data rates: up to 100 kHz
*   OH-LIF Laser wavelength: 283 nm (Q(6) line)
*   OH-LIF Laser filter: 310 nm
*   OH-LIF axial position range: -1.45D < z < -1.9D
*   Laser systems:
    *   Two-dimensional Dantec LDA with BSA enhanced processors
    *   6 W Coherent Innova 90 argon ion laser
    *   XeCl-excimer pumped dye laser (Lambda Physics EMG 201 and Scanmate 2 with Coumarin 153 dye)
    *   KrF-excimer laser
